title: [MTR3/4] British Rail Class 350
description: Resource pack that adds BR Class 350 into Minecraft via Minecraft Transit Railway.
body:
_A resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway._

# Overview
The **British Rail Class 350** _Desiro_ is a class of Electric Multiple Unit (EMU) manufactured by Siemens Transportation Systems between 2004-2014 under its Desiro UK platform.

The 30 Class 350/1 units entered service in 2005, jointly used by Central Trains and Silverlink. They are also the only units to have contact shoe, which makes them to be able to run services in the Southern Region. They are transferred to London Midland after Central Trains and Silverlink's franchise ends in 2007, and transferred to London Northwestern Railway after London Midland's franchise ends in 2017.

London Midland ordered 37 Class 350/2 units as to replace its Class 321s. They are originally used to run commuter services thus having a lower max speed (100mph), but they are modified to match the max speed of 350/1 during 2018 to allow them to work with other subclasses. They are transferred to London Northwestern Railway after London Midland's franchise ends in 2017.

During 2011 London Midland announced that they are going to buy a further 18 Class 350 units, of which 8 will be working with London Midland, and remaining 10 to be sub-leased to First TransPennine Express. However, in 2012 it is announced that the plan is changed with London Midland will be ordering 20 Class 350s, of which 10 of them designated as 350/3 for London Midland, another 10 of them designated as 350/4 for First TransPennine Express. 350/3s are transferred to London Northwestern Railway after London Midland's franchise ends in 2017, and 350/4 are also transferred to London Northwestern Railway between 2019 and 2020 following the replacement Class 397 makes their debut in TransPennine Express. 


This resource pack is to add the Class 350 into Minecraft with Minecraft Transit Railway mod, made by humbugs in 2024, and finished by Navi_LX9702.

# What will be in this pack?
### British Rail Class 350:
#### 350/1:
1. Central Trains
2. London Midland (Yellow and yellow / black gangway variants)
3. London Northwestern Railway (With and without PID variants)

#### 350/2:
4. London Midland / London Northwestern Railway (Yellow and yellow / black gangway variants)
5. London Northwestern Railway (Without the green band from LM livery, Yellow and yellow / black gangway variants)
6. London Northwestern Railway (London Northwestern Railway-ish livery)

#### 350/3:
7. London Midland (Yellow and yellow / black gangway variants)
8. London Northwestern Railway (With and without PID variants)

#### 350/4:
9. First TransPennine Express (As-built livery, called "Debut livery" in game)
10. London Northwestern Railway (With and without PID variants)

# Disclaimer
This resource pack is not associated with, and is not an official product of, Central Trains Limited, Silverlink Train Services Limited, London & Birmingham Railway Limited (London Midland), West Midlands Trains Limited (LNWR) and First/Keolis TransPennine Limited (TPE).
